svg.text: CDAGS — Mixture of Experts (MOE) Agent Architecture
OT Plant AI Management Framework · FastAPI + SQLAlchemy · v1.0.0
CORSMiddleware · lifespan(create_all) · Pydantic validation · get_db() session injection
LAYER 2 — EXPERT AGENTS (Orchestrators / Gating Function) · app/models/agent.py → ExpertAgent
🔀 MOE Gating Layer — routes tasks to domain specialists
↕ Many-to-Many · expert_sub_agent_mapping (expert_agent_id FK ↔ sub_agent_id FK, CASCADE delete) ↕
LAYER 3a — CAG (Common Agent Group) · Reusable horizontal specialists shared across ALL Expert Agents
Horizontal capabilities reused across domains · any Expert Agent can invoke any CAG
LAYER 3b — SAG (Specialized Agent Group) · Domain-specific specialists, each bound to ONE Expert Agent
Domain-exclusive specialists · tuned for a single Expert Agent's functional domain
LAYER 4 — INTERACTION LEDGER · app/models/agent.py → AgentInteraction · Table: agent_interactions
📋 AgentInteraction — Full Audit Trail of Every Expert ↔ Sub-Agent Exchange
Observability · LLM cost attribution (token tracking) · Performance tuning (duration_ms) · Future model fine-tuning data
LAYER 5 — SYSTEM LOG · app/models/log.py → SystemLog · Table: system_logs
🪵 SystemLog — Operational Event Bus for All System Activity
Fields: id · created_at · level · source · message · metadata_json
Level enforced by: Pydantic Literal type (schema layer) + SQL CheckConstraint (database layer) — invalid levels rejected at both layers
Sources: "USER" (agent selections) · "SYSTEM" (seeding, startup) · "API" (route events) · ordered DESC newest-first · max 500/request
